shared_agent_baseline.conclusion: Modest improvement over fixed_local (+0.81 pp) but did not exceed capacity_split oracle. Local-dominant with late horizontal exploration.

per_ea_distributed_baseline.conclusion: Learned different final policy (100% vertical) than shared-agent (local-dominant), confirming per-EA autonomy. However, underperformed both shared-agent (−3.31 pp) and oracle (−3.58 pp) on completion.

learning_insights.implication: Single-agent learner found local routing near-optimal for this environment

learning_insights.observation: Per-EA distributed converged to 100% vertical strategy
learning_insights.implication: Per-EA architecture enables independent learning but got stuck in suboptimal mode

learning_insights.observation: Per-EA final policy differs from shared-agent (vertical vs local)
learning_insights.implication: Per-EA architecture prevents homogenization; agents learn differentiated strategies

learning_insights.observation: Per-EA 18/20 agents prefer local when available
learning_insights.implication: Per-agent autonomy is real; agents learned heterogeneous routing preferences
Different is not better; shared-parameter trainer found more effective strategy

possible_explanations_for_difference.explanation: 20 independent agents exploring separately may get stuck in local optima more easily
All agents see same environment; per-agent epsilon schedules may not provide sufficient exploration diversity
Fixed lr=7e-7, γ=0.99, target_sync=2000 may not be optimal for per-EA training
Per-agent replay buffers (10k capacity) may be smaller effective samples than shared buffer

recommendations.freeze_baselines: No further changes to shared-agent or per-EA distributed campaigns
optional_improvements: Run lr/gamma sweep if hyperparameter robustness desired
Run per-agent hyperparameter tuning if per-EA performance improvement desired
Run LSTM ablation if recurrence contribution needs isolation
recommendations.proposed_method: Separate branch; only after baseline review complete
recommendations.next_phase: Awaiting user decision on optional work and proposed-method approval
